mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chatbot_conversation_memory (conversation_id, messages_json) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{messagesJson}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE messages_json = VALUES(messages_json)
mapper.select: SELECT conversation_id FROM chatbot_conversation_memory WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT conversation_id AS conversationId, title AS title FROM chatbot_conversation_memory WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND application_case_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 5
